title: iseilema ciliatum
intro: Iseilema ciliatum is a type of grass found in tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Africa and Asia. This plant is traditionally used in medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Iseilema ciliatum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a laxative. Iseilema ciliatum is often prepared in herbal form, typically as a decoction or infusion, to be consumed for its medicinal properties.
